I,S in ipairs({{-343076+343077,518659+-518285};{745623+-745622,-315786-(-315922)};{772328-772191,-122419-(-122793)}})do while S[445009+-445008]<S[60905+-60903]do local function I(I)return E[I+(601667-590933)]end do local return(function(E,x,C,p,W,Q,N,Y,U,h,B,l,s,i,S,r,y,K,j,b,H)K,S,U,j,H,B,Y,l,b,s,h,i,y,r={},function(S,C,p,W)local Bx={}local jz,Gz,fz,P,V,Hz,cz,R,Ex,dz,Iz,N,Kz,pz,qz,yz,px,Uz,f,Cz,L,sz,az,c,Sz,G,Nz,e,X,Qx,tz,Nx,Z,q,M,Rz,rz,k,zz,uz,Bz,Vz,Yz,Tz,Cx,Jz,h,iz,xx,bz,Wx,D,wz,T,d,Ez,w,v,hx,hz,Pz,jx,Fz,o,mz,u,i,xz,Qz,gz,F,Xz,Ix,Kx,kz,U,O,t,Zz,Wz,z,a,Mz,Dz,Oz,ez,g,A,l,Az,vz,nz,Sx,Lz,n,B,lz,m,J,oz
